title: Group of Temples at Kiramchi
tagline: Group of Temples at Kiramchi — spiritual town of Jammu & Kashmir

heroImage.alt: Group of Temples at Kiramchi, Jammu & Kashmir

overview.short: Krimchi temples is a complex of seven ancient Hindu temples in the Udhampur District of the Jammu Division in Jammu and Kashmir, India.
overview.description: Krimchi temples is a complex of seven ancient Hindu temples in the Udhampur District of the Jammu Division in Jammu and Kashmir, India. It is located on bank of a stream Birunala in village Krimachi, 12 km from Udhampur. This group of temples is locally known as the Pandava Temples.

topPlaces.name: Udhampur
topPlaces.description: Udhampur (Hindi pronunciation: [ˌʊd̪ʱəmpur]) is a city and a municipal council in Udhampur district in the Indian union territory of Jammu and Kashmir. It is the headquarters of Udhampur District.

topPlaces.name: Rehambal
topPlaces.description: Rehambal is a census town in Udhampur district about 9 km from Udhampur Bus Stand in the Indian union territory of Jammu and Kashmir.

items.note: Udhampur (Hindi pronunciation: [ˌʊd̪ʱəmpur]) is a city and a municipal council in Udhampur district in the Indian union territory of Jammu and Kashmir. It is the headquarters of Udhampur District.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Group of Temples at Kiramchi?
faq.a: The best time to visit Group of Temples at Kiramchi is Mar – Jun, Sep – Nov. Summers are 15–28°C and winters are 2–16°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Group of Temples at Kiramchi?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Jammu Airport (40 km) and the nearest railway station is Katra (Vaishno Devi railhead) (16 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Group of Temples at Kiramchi?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Group of Temples at Kiramchi at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Group of Temples at Kiramchi?
faq.a: Stays in Group of Temples at Kiramchi start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Group of Temples at Kiramchi?
faq.a: The top attractions are Udhampur, Rehambal.
